form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (17.74) at this track, making it two placings on end. Has the inside draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (17.74) at this track, making it two placings on end. Has the inside draw this time. Cannot be ruled out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at this track over 300m. The start prior was at her best with a 1.5 lengths win over 272m at The Gardens. Tested under these conditions.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at this track over 300m. The start prior was at her best with a 1.5 lengths win over 272m at The Gardens. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Sacrifice at this track last start over 300m (17.75). Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good improvement when third behind Sacrifice at this track last start over 300m (17.75). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (17.71) at this track over 300m. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 5 for the first time after finishing a 14 length eighth at this track (18.34) in a Grade 5. Tough field and looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth on March 25 over 300m at this track behind At The Gate, beaten 10 lengths (18.23) in a Grade 5. This will test.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth at this track (18.22) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability but needs to find best and others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability but needs to find best and others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Patient Vicky at this track last start over 300m (17.79). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Patient Vicky at this track last start over 300m (17.79). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a sixth (23.87) in a GR 5 at The Gardens six-and-a-half months ago. Expect him to be prominent.
